name: usetheform-workspace
description: React library for composing declarative forms in React and managing their state.

scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test yarn workspace usetheform run test
scripts.coveralls: yarn workspace usetheform test --coverage && cat ./coverage/lcov.info | coveralls
scripts.dev: rimraf dev coverage && concurrently "node ./build_config/dev.js" "browser-sync start --server examples --ss dev --files dev --files examples"
scripts.cy:server:dev: rimraf dev build coverage && concurrently "npm run build:dev" "browser-sync start --no-ui --no-ghost-mode --no-open --port 3000 --server cypress/server --ss  workspaces/usetheform/dev --files workspaces/usetheform/dev --files cypress/server"
scripts.cy:server: rimraf dev build coverage && node ./build_config/build.js && browser-sync start --no-ui --no-open --no-ghost-mode --port 3000 --server cypress/server --ss build/umd

author: Antonio Pangallo (https://github.com/antoniopangallo)
